description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is made from polished wood, extending from the butt to the fore-end, and features a smooth, ergonomic shape for comfortable shouldering. The rifle is equipped with a telescopic scope mounted above the receiver, indicating its use for precision shooting or hunting. The bolt handle is visible on the right side, and the trigger guard and magazine well are integrated into the lower receiver. The barrel is slender and unadorned, with no visible muzzle device, and the overall design is traditional and utilitarian. Metal components, including the receiver, barrel, and scope, contrast with the rich brown wood of the stock.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock, long steel barrel, and mounted telescopic scope.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, and mounted scope.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel and the rounded butt of the wooden stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile displaying the bolt handle, scope, and the rifle's traditional lines.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the top of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
